name: @block-agent/core
description: block-agent core runtime: Block tree, Operations + PolicyEngine, Renderer, App framework, providers, AgentRuntime. Zero runtime dependencies.
$exports_note: No '.' root export: src/index.ts is the demo boot (self-runs main()). Consumers import the classes/types they need via these area subpaths, e.g. '@block-agent/core/core/block.js'.
